one_time_description: Large Province of BC revenue of $55,328,544 in 2024 vs $9,781,106 in 2023, likely related to treaty or settlement payments
economic_notes: Band has significant business enterprises including Duz Cho Group of Companies LP, Sekani Forest Products LP, McLeod Lake Mackenzie Community Forest LP, Three Feathers LP. Entered co-design agreement with Defense Metals Corporation for Wicheeda rare earth element project, purchasing approximately 2.6 million common shares at $0.26/share totaling $665,026. Duz Cho Forest Products LP underwent financial restructuring with Band paying off all outstanding debt. DCL LP transferred all equipment and operations to DCC LP effective July 1, 2024.
notes: Very large spike in Province of BC revenue ($55.3M vs $9.8M prior year) likely related to a treaty settlement or major IBA payment. The auditor signature shows only 'Chartered Professional Accountants' with Prince George BC address but no firm name explicitly stated in the provided text. Consolidated entities include Social Housing Fund, Tse'khene Community Development Corporation (inactive), Tse'khene Food and Fuel Ltd., Duz Cho Forest Products LP, and Duz Cho Forest Products Ltd. Twelve entities accounted for under modified equity method. Several entities at cost only. New PS 3400 Revenue standard adopted April 1, 2023 without restatement of prior periods. Forgiveness of $8,614,133 in advances to DCC LP and DCL Ltd. post year-end restructuring. Net financial assets figure is from the budget column as actual balance sheet data not fully provided in text excerpt. $2,403,048 internally restricted to housing programs in addition to $1,076,318 restricted gaming funds.
